_comment: Class F (thread-safety) type tokens. RustPython has NO `unsendable` attribute; the `threading` feature (an always-on default) blanket-impls Send+Sync for every #[pyclass] payload, so a payload holding non-Sync interior mutability compiles ONLY via a hand-written `unsafe impl Sync`. The scanner joins those two facts. Matched with a `\b<token>\s*<` word-boundary regex, which naturally excludes `AtomicCell` (from `Cell`) and `Arc` (from `Rc`).
